<script>
                        var parent = document.currentScript.parentNode;

                        var id = generateId();
                        parent.id = id;

                        MathCell(id, []);

                        parent.update = function (id) {

                            //(x x + y y)^(1 / 4) cos(1 / 2 atan2(y,x))
                            //u cos(v), u sin(v),

                            var pi = Math.PI;

                            var Re1 = (x, y) => Math.pow(x * x + y * y, 1 / 4) * Math.cos(1 / 2 * Math.atan2(y, x));

                            var Re2 = (x, y) => Math.pow(x * x + y * y, 1 / 4) * Math.cos(1 / 2 * (Math.atan2(y, x) + 2 * pi));

                            var data = [];

                            var s = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                            u * Math.sin(v),
                            Re1(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v))
                            ],
                                [0, 2], [-pi, pi], {
                                color: '#80aaff',
                                opacity: 0.9
                            }
                            );
                            var t = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                            u * Math.sin(v),
                            Re2(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v))
                            ],
                                [0, 2], [-pi, pi], {
                                color: '#cc99ff',
                                opacity: 0.9
                            }
                            );

                            data.push(s);
                            data.push(t);

                            var config = {
                                type: 'threejs',
                                frame: true,
                                viewpoint: [1, -1, 0.5]
                            };

                            evaluate(id, data, config);

                        }

                        parent.update(id);
                    </script>

verbatim_map.@@verbatim:16:6afe8d@@:
<script>
                        var parent = document.currentScript.parentNode;

                        var id = generateId();
                        parent.id = id;

                        MathCell(id, []);

                        parent.update = function (id) {

                            //(x² + y²)^(1 / (2n)) cos(1 / n atan2(y,x) + 1 / n 2 π k)
                            //u cos(v), u sin(v),

                            var pi = Math.PI;

                            var Re = (x, y, n, k) => Math.pow(x * x + y * y, 1 / (2 * n)) * Math.cos(1 / n * Math.atan2(y, x) +
                                1 / n * 2 * pi * k);


                            var data = [];

                            var s = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                            u * Math.sin(v),
                            Re(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v), 3, 0)
                            ],
                                [0, 2], [-pi, pi - pi / 100000], {
                                color: '#80aaff',
                                opacity: 0.9
                            }
                            );
                            var t = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                            u * Math.sin(v),
                            Re(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v), 3, 1)
                            ],
                                [0, 2], [-pi, pi - pi / 100000], {
                                color: '#ff99cc',
                                opacity: 0.9
                            }
                            );
                            var w = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                            u * Math.sin(v),
                            Re(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v), 3, 2)
                            ],
                                [0, 2], [-pi, pi - pi / 100000], {
                                color: '#339933',
                                opacity: 0.9
                            }
                            );

                            data.push(s);
                            data.push(t);
                            data.push(w);

                            var config = {
                                type: 'threejs',
                                frame: true,
                                viewpoint: [1, -1, 0.5]
                            };

                            evaluate(id, data, config);

                        }

                        parent.update(id);
                    </script>

verbatim_map.@@verbatim:20:3201a1@@:
<script>
                        var parent = document.currentScript.parentNode;

                        var id = generateId();
                        parent.id = id;

                        MathCell(id, []);

                        parent.update = function (id) {

                            /*
                             C1(x,y)=y² - x² + 1
                             C2(x,y)=-2 x y
        
                             D(x,y) = C1(x, y)² + C2(x, y)²
        
                             R(x,y) = sqrt(C1(x, y)² + C2(x, y)²)
        
                             T(x,y) = atan2(C2(x, y),C1(x, y))
        
        
                             M(x,y)=(C1(x, y) sqrt(R(x, y)) cos(T(x, y) / 2) + sqrt(R(x, y)) sin(T(x, y) / 2) C2(x, y)) / D(x, y)
        
                             N(x,y)=(C1(x, y) sqrt(R(x, y)) cos(T(x, y) / 2 + pi ) + sqrt(R(x, y)) sin(T(x, y) / 2 + pi ) C2(x, y)) / D(x, y)
        
                             */
                            //u cos(v), u sin(v),

                            var pi = Math.PI;

                            var C1 = (x, y) => y * y - x * x + 1;
                            var C2 = (x, y) => -2 * x * y;

                            var D = (x, y) => Math.pow(C1(x, y), 2) + Math.pow(C2(x, y), 2);

                            var R = (x, y) => Math.sqrt(Math.pow(C1(x, y), 2) + Math.pow(C2(x, y), 2));

                            var T = (x, y) => Math.atan2(C2(x, y), C1(x, y));

                            var M = (x, y) => (C1(x, y) * Math.sqrt(R(x, y)) * Math.cos(T(x, y) / 2) + Math.sqrt(R(x, y)) * Math.sin(T(
                                x, y) / 2) * C2(x, y)) / D(x, y);


                            var N = (x, y) => (C1(x, y) * Math.sqrt(R(x, y)) * Math.cos(T(x, y) / 2 + pi) + Math.sqrt(R(x, y)) *
                                Math.sin(T(x, y) / 2 + pi) * C2(x, y)) / D(x, y);

                            var data = [];

                            var s = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                            u * Math.sin(v),
                            M(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v))
                            ],
                                [0.0001, 2], [-pi, pi], {
                                color: '#cc0066',
                                opacity: 0.9
                            }
                            );
                            var t = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                            u * Math.sin(v),
                            N(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v))
                            ],
                                [0.0001, 2], [-pi, pi], {
                                color: '#6666ff',
                                opacity: 0.9
                            }
                            );

                            data.push(s);
                            data.push(t);

                            var config = {
                                type: 'threejs',
                                frame: true,
                                viewpoint: [1, -1, 0.5]
                            };

                            evaluate(id, data, config);

                        }

                        parent.update(id);
                    </script>

                                 C2(x,y)=-2 x y

                                 N(x,y)=(C1(x, y) sqrt(R(x, y)) cos(T(x, y) / 2 + pi ) + sqrt(R(x, y)) sin(T(x, y) / 2 + pi ) C2(x, y)) / D(x, y)
          
                                 */
                                //u cos(v), u sin(v),

                                var pi = Math.PI;

                                var C1 = (x, y) => y * y - x * x + 1;
                                var C2 = (x, y) => -2 * x * y;

                                var D = (x, y) => Math.pow(C1(x, y), 2) + Math.pow(C2(x, y), 2);

                                var R = (x, y) => Math.sqrt(Math.pow(C1(x, y), 2) + Math.pow(C2(x, y), 2));

                                var T = (x, y) => Math.atan2(C2(x, y), C1(x, y));

                                var M = (x, y) => (C1(x, y) * Math.sqrt(R(x, y)) * Math.sin(T(x, y) / 2) - Math.sqrt(R(x, y)) * Math.cos(
                                    T(x, y) / 2) * C2(x, y)) / D(x, y);

                                var N = (x, y) => (C1(x, y) * Math.sqrt(R(x, y)) * Math.sin(T(x, y) / 2 + pi) - Math.sqrt(R(x, y)) *

                                var data = [];

                                var den = 1200;

                                var s = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                                u * Math.sin(v),
                                M(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v))
                                ],

                                }
                                );

                                var s1 = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                                u * Math.sin(v),
                                M(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v))
                                ],
                                    [0.0001, 2], [pi / den, pi - pi / den], {
                                    color: '#b3b3b3',
                                    opacity: 0.9
                                }
                                );
                                var t1 = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                                u * Math.sin(v),
                                N(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v))
                                ],
                                    [0.0001, 2], [pi / den, pi - pi / den], {

                                }

                                data.push(s);

verbatim_map.@@verbatim:22:1c2a81@@:
<script>
                        var parent = document.currentScript.parentNode;

                        var id = generateId();
                        parent.id = id;

                        MathCell(id, []);

                        parent.update = function (id) {

                            /*
                             F(x,y)= (1 - y² - x²) / (x² + (1 - y)²)
                             G(x,y)= (-2x) / (x² + (1 - y)²)
      
                             Re(x,y) = -1 / 2 atan2(G(x, y),F(x, y))
      
                             */
                            //u cos(v), u sin(v),

                            var pi = Math.PI;

                            var F = (x, y) => (1 - y * y - x * x) / (x * x + (1 - y) * (1 - y));
                            var G = (x, y) => (-2 * x) / (x * x + (1 - y) * (1 - y));

                            var Re = (x, y, n) => -1 / 2 * Math.atan2(G(x, y), F(x, y)) + n;


                            var data = [];

                            var s = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                            u * Math.sin(v),
                            Re(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v), 0)
                            ],
                                [0.0001, 2], [(-pi) / 2, pi / 2 - pi / 10000], {
                                color: '#cc0066',
                                opacity: 0.9
                            }
                            );
                            var t = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                            u * Math.sin(v),
                            Re(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v), 0)
                            ],
                                [0.0001, 2], [pi / 2 + pi / 10000, 3 * pi / 2 - pi / 10000], {
                                color: '#cc0066',
                                opacity: 0.9
                            }
                            );
                            var s1 = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                            u * Math.sin(v),
                            Re(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v), pi)
                            ],
                                [0.0001, 2], [(-pi) / 2, pi / 2 - pi / 10000], {
                                color: '#6666ff',
                                opacity: 0.9
                            }
                            );
                            var t1 = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                            u * Math.sin(v),
                            Re(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v), pi)
                            ],
                                [0.0001, 2], [pi / 2 + pi / 10000, 3 * pi / 2 - pi / 10000], {
                                color: '#6666ff',
                                opacity: 0.9
                            }
                            );
                            var s2 = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                            u * Math.sin(v),
                            Re(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v), -pi)
                            ],
                                [0.0001, 2], [(-pi) / 2, pi / 2 - pi / 10000], {
                                color: '#00b3b3',
                                opacity: 0.9
                            }
                            );
                            var t2 = parametric((u, v) => [u * Math.cos(v),
                            u * Math.sin(v),
                            Re(u * Math.cos(v), u * Math.sin(v), -pi)
                            ],
                                [0.0001, 2], [pi / 2 + pi / 10000, 3 * pi / 2 - pi / 10000], {
                                color: '#00b3b3',
                                opacity: 0.9
                            }
                            );

                            data.push(s);
                            data.push(t);
                            data.push(s1);
                            data.push(t1);
                            data.push(s2);
                            data.push(t2);

                            var config = {
                                type: 'threejs',
                                frame: true,
                                viewpoint: [1, -1, 0.5]
                            };

                            evaluate(id, data, config);

                        }

                        parent.update(id);
                    </script>

text_blocks.text:
The following are some examples of multiple-valued functions. In each case, the branch is identified
                    with a different color. 
                    Click on either the top-right menu or
                    the following functions to explore.

[[a href="#ex1"]]\(f(z) = z^{1/2}\)[[/a]]    [[a
                        href="#ex2"]]\(f(z) =
                        z^{1/3}\)[[/a]]    [[a href="#ex3"]]\(f(z) = \sqrt{1-z^2}\)[[/a]]   
                    [[a href="#ex4"]]\(f(z) = \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{1-z^2}}\)[[/a]]    [[a href="#ex5"]]\(f(z) =
                        \arctan(z)\)[[/a]]

Examples

The following are some examples of multiple-valued functions. In each case, the branch is identified with a different color. Click on either the top-right menu or the following functions to explore.
